summary: Iteration 58: Debug State Snapshot endpoint (/api/debug/state-snapshot) tests completed. All 25 backend tests pass. The endpoint provides read-only state export for offline analysis with proper header-based authentication (X-Debug-Snapshot-Key or ?key= fallback). Verified: 403 on missing/wrong keys, freshness metadata (snapshot_at, version 1.0, server_start_time, uptime_seconds, git_commit), positions grouped by strategy (54 weather, 11 crypto, 21 arb), token IDs truncated to 12 chars for security, lifecycle config with slot rotation, entry quality stats, PnL summary, strategy health, weather config (66 fields), and no secrets exposed.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 403 when no key provided - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 403 when wrong key provided - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot works with X-Debug-Snapshot-Key header - PASS

details: Security: prevents exposure of full token identifiers
Includes: min_edge_bps, min_confidence, lifecycle_mode, slot_rotation_enabled, etc.
No MongoDB connection strings in response

sample_position.market_question: Will the highest temperature in New York City be 50°F or higher on March 17?

seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 weather + 11 crypto + 21 arb positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified Debug State Snapshot endpoint (/api/debug/state-snapshot). Key findings: (1) Auth works via X-Debug-Snapshot-Key header (preferred) or ?key= query param (fallback). Returns 403 without valid key. (2) Freshness metadata includes snapshot_at, snapshot_version (1.0), server_start_time, uptime_seconds, git_commit, last_weather_scan_time, weather_total_scans. (3) Positions grouped by strategy: weather (54), crypto (11), arb (21). (4) All token_ids truncated to max 12 chars for security. (5) Lifecycle includes mode, config with slot rotation, exit_candidates_detail array. (6) Entry quality has rejections/passed_signals. (7) PnL summary has total_realized/unrealized/total/open_positions. (8) Strategy health has weather, crypto_sniper, arb_scanner entries. (9) Weather config returns all 66 fields. (10) Security verified: no API keys, wallet addresses, or DB strings in response. (11) Previous features (lifecycle, simulator, entry quality, positions) still work.
